trimmedChitChat.startTrimmed: 00:00:00-00:50:11 — 50-min pre-call waiting / group chit-chat / tech checks. No salvageable educational content.
trimmedChitChat.midTrimmedVictoria: 01:51:32-01:55:00 — Victoria Bergin shares personal infertility/marriage disclosure. Per Brian's directive, struck from the course.
trimmedChitChat.midTrimmedLorraine: 02:01:48-02:03:59 — Lorraine Truman shares personal 5-year infertility disclosure. Per Brian's directive, struck from the course.
trimmedChitChat.endTrimmed: 02:09:36-end — Personal goodbyes after Clay's CEO-of-emotions metaphor wraps.

lessons.title: Why Infertility Is Different: Clay's Story and Disenfranchised Grief
lessons.topicSummary: Clay Brigance's bio and personal infertility journey. Boat-in-storm metaphor. The 48% statistic. Disenfranchised grief. Clay's male-factor diagnosis story. Founding of Shiloh Counseling.

lessons.title: Infertility as Trauma: Ontological Death and Couple Breakdown Predictors
lessons.topicSummary: Janet Jaffe's reproductive story theory, ontological death, brain can't distinguish death of a dream from physical death. Decisional conflict. Clay's research on 1,000+ couples: misattunement, heightened conflict, reduced/mechanical sex.

lessons.title: The Male Experience, Well-Intended Chivalry, and the 43% PTSD Finding
lessons.topicSummary: Clay's qualitative study of seven men. Masculinity-equals-virility trap, well-intended chivalry, legacy-lost. Clay's 2023 PCL-5 study of 281 individuals: 43% meeting criteria for diagnosable PTSD vs. 2-5% baseline.

lessons.title: Self-Soothing, Interpersonal Mindfulness, and Building Support
lessons.topicSummary: Trauma triggers physiological flooding; self-soothing back to prefrontal cortex. Accepting influence, metaphoric language, interpersonal mindfulness. Emotional vs practical support, friend-with-barbecue, five-friend prayer group. Clay's curated resource list.

lessons.title: Q&A: PTSD Duration, Resilience, and Achieving Acceptance
lessons.topicSummary: Naomi's Q&A on the 43% PTSD cohort (~3 years average). Rock-in-pocket metaphor for grief over decades. Body Keeps the Score reference. Shift from expectation to grief-acceptance. Wet-soap metaphor. Clay's redefinition of masculinity. How providers can plant seeds of acceptance without forcing it.

lessons.title: Provider Co-Regulation and Clinical Presence
lessons.topicSummary: Providers who slow down vs those who don't. Mirror neurons, regulated clinicians. Clay's example of his fertility doctor closing her laptop. Validating the time-pressure providers face.

lessons.title: Humility, Vertical Assessment, and Healthy Boundaries
lessons.topicSummary: Clay's 94-couple study finding humility as the biggest predictor of couple satisfaction. The 26-question Vertical Assessment as non-diagnostic conversation starter. Healthy boundaries vs. turtling on social media and avoidance.

lessons.title: Recurrent Loss, Hypervigilance, and the CEO of Emotions
lessons.topicSummary: Rebecca's question on hypervigilance after recurrent loss. Psychoeducation, unhooking from the loss narrative. Clay's CEO-and-board-of-emotions metaphor for holding anxiety, shame, hope, and joy at the same table.

notes: APPROVED 2026-05-01. 8 lessons. Three internal trims: 6692-6900 (Victoria), 7308-7439 (Lorraine), and the 50-min pre-roll. All adjacent lessons contiguous within their segments.
